# Customs and Duties

When ordering internationally from Acme Shop, customers should be aware of customs duties and taxes, often termed customs fees, which are determined by the destination country based on the item's value and nature. These fees are the responsibility of the customer, as Acme Shop does not impose or control them. While an estimated delivery timeline is provided at checkout, customs processing may cause delays, which can last from days to weeks depending on the country's regulations. Some locations offer the option to pre-pay these fees at checkout, but this is not universally available.

[Source: international_shipping.md#customs-and-duties]
